seeds.label: reset_vector
seeds.rationale: MIPS R3000A reset vector; first instruction executed after power-on

seeds.label: general_exception_bev1
seeds.rationale: BEV=1 general exception vector; active during early BIOS init before BEV is cleared

excluded.label: utlb_miss_bev1
excluded.rationale: R3000 UTLB-miss vector when BEV=1. PS1 R3000A has no TLB; address is never executed. Bytes at 0xBFC00108 are the ASCII string 'Sony Computer Entertainment Inc.' — walking from here produces garbage opcodes. Proven invalid by Phase 1b inventory walker.
